expectations.text: Enables grounding via tools: [{ googleSearch: {} }] in config
States Web Search grounding works on both Nano Banana 2 and Pro (not Pro-only)
expectations.evidence: 'works on both Nano Banana 2 and Nano Banana Pro'

expectations.text: States every generated image carries an invisible SynthID watermark
expectations.evidence: 'invisible SynthID watermark' on every generated and edited image

expectations.text: States there is NO API flag to disable the SynthID watermark
expectations.evidence: 'there is no API flag to turn it off'

expectations.text: Does not invent a disable parameter; distinguishes consumer 'Gemini sparkle' from always-on SynthID
expectations.evidence: Separates consumer 'Gemini sparkle' from always-on SynthID; no invented disable param
